schema.document: Root keys: version (number), schema (object, documentation only), blueprint_ref (string, optional pointer), items (array). Validators must allow blueprint_ref.

items.title: Phase 1 — Schemas + ingestion (append-only POST /api/events)
items.bound: shared/schemas + ingest path; DB canonical_events; strict validation, unknown fields rejected; blueprint §2 (services/ingest layout), §4 Event Schema, §14 API, §17 phase 1
items.last_note: POST /api/events + /api/ingest: Zod strict + persistFluencyEventRecord → Prisma canonical_events when DATABASE_URL set (org from JWT/x-org-id). Readers merge DB + memory via loadFluencyEventRecords.

items.title: Phase 2 — Execution + trace reconstruction
items.bound: trace_engine + lifecycle reducer; ordering, retries, tool/step grouping; blueprint §5–6, §17 phase 2
items.last_note: trace_engine + execution_lifecycle + Jest contracts/trace tests green; blueprint target services/* layout still optional incremental migration

items.title: Phase 3 — FSC eligibility + minimum signal gates (hard pre-classify)
items.bound: PRD §18 FSC + §20 min signal + §21 steps 1–2 only (not full classify); map to INCOMPLETE_EXECUTION / INSUFFICIENT_SIGNAL; code: services/gates or execution_disclosure; blueprint §7 FSC, §8 Min Signal (§12 suppression wiring continues in phase-05)
items.last_note: fluency_execution_gates.ts: evaluateFluencyExecutionGates → FSC + min signal; attachPhase2ToTraces skips classify when gates fail; disclosure reasons incomplete_execution / insufficient_signal + fsc:* / min_signal:*; observability_aggregate aligned

items.title: Phase 4 — Signal detection + threshold calibration (internal numeric)
items.bound: execution_signals + workflow_baseline: rolling N=200 per workflow, P25/P75; categories LOW/NORMAL/HIGH internal; no numeric API leak; blueprint §9–10
items.last_note: workflow_baseline: iteration_low from P25; latency P75 unchanged; WORKFLOW_BASELINE_MAX_SAMPLE_EXECUTIONS (default 200) newest-first cap per workflow

items.title: Phase 5 — Deterministic pattern classification + suppression pipeline
items.bound: behavioral_patterns + suppression: priority order, mutual exclusion, ambiguity → AMBIGUITY; no inference/ML on product path; blueprint §11–12
items.last_note: Fluency path: fluency-pattern-suppression.ts maps signals → classifyBehaviorPattern + evaluateSuppression; attachPhase2ToTraces + observability_aggregate + disclosure (classification_ambiguity + suppression:* diagnostics). Legacy classifyExecutionPattern kept for direct unit tests / doc parity.

items.title: Phase 6 — Workflow aggregation + observability API
items.bound: observability_aggregate + GET /api/observability/:orgId; workflow-level only; cohort suppression; blueprint §13–14
items.last_note: Rollup per-execution path now uses same FSC/min gates + evaluateExecutionDisclosure as traces; still no numeric baseline leak

items.title: Phase 7 — Tests, harness verify, governance regression
items.bound: harness/scripts/verify.sh; harness/feature_list.json passes per docs/agent/EVALUATION.md; blueprint §16 + forbidden-field API tests
items.last_note: npm run test:ci --workspace backend; ./harness/scripts/verify.sh; python3 scripts/ci_v1_governance_gates.py; backend/tests/fluency_execution_gates.test.ts

items.title: AI Value Platform: engine core, data layer + API, workbench wiring, intake + second domain
items.bound: shared/src/aiValueEngine/**, scripts/*ai_value* wrappers, backend ai_value_routes + repository + prisma ai_value_objects, frontend AIValueWorkspace live mode, sales-pipeline fixtures; acceptance: all ai-value/engine/backend/frontend suites pass, governance gates pass
items.last_note: User-authorized 2026-06-09 (Claude): four slices complete and committed on codex/FluencyTracr-ai-value-platform; engine contract Phase 1 migration done for stages 1-6 with CLI/tests preserved.

items.title: AI Value Platform: product spine experience from whole-system diagrams
items.bound: docs/agent/AI_VALUE_PLATFORM_NEXT_AGENT_HANDOFF.md plus frontend AI Value Journey/Workspace, shared value-chain view models, and focused tests; acceptance: /ai-value-journey explains Human Readiness -> Blueprint -> Execution -> Evidence -> Value Realization -> Outcomes in client language and each phase feeds the next without unsupported ROI, causality, individual scoring, HR analytics, or ranking claims
items.last_note: Done 2026-06-11 UTC: Product Spine V1, multi-page Workspace, Blueprint workshop board, Metrics ROI opportunity map, Evidence-to-Value path, governed Scenario, Executive Readout, Sponsor Decisions, and agentic handoffs are implemented and acceptance-audited. Verified frontend, AI value contracts, governance gates, diff check, and browser smoke at 1440px/390px.

items.title: AI Value Platform: governed EBITA Impact Bridge
items.bound: shared/src/aiValueEngine/ebitaBridge.ts, scripts/validate_ai_value_ebita_bridge.test.mjs, docs/concepts/EBITA_IMPACT_BRIDGE.md; acceptance: map value routes to EBITA drivers, validate evidence quality, financial translation policy, safe language, source ROI gate compatibility, no usage-derived EBITA calculation, no frontend, no routes, no DB schema, no dashboards, no individual scoring, no manager_or_team_ranking
items.last_note: Done 2026-06-12 UTC: deterministic shared EBITA translation layer after ROI Scenario. It maps value routes to EBITA drivers, validates source ROI gate compatibility, and blocks usage-derived EBITA, individual scoring, manager_or_team_ranking, UI, routes, DB schema, dashboards, and connectors.

items.title: AI Value Platform: governed Executive Readout V2
items.bound: shared/src/aiValueEngine/executivePacket.ts, shared/src/aiValueEngine/readoutHtml.ts, scripts/generate_ai_value_executive_packet.test.mjs, scripts/generate_ai_value_readout_html.test.mjs, schemas/ai-value-intelligence/executive-packet.schema.json, docs/concepts/EXECUTIVE_READOUT_V2.md; acceptance: optional ebita_impact_summary, markdown/html EBITA Impact Bridge section, evidence-quality-driven allowed language, usage-only ROI/EBITA blocked, individual productivity/manager ranking/HRIS/headcount claims blocked
items.last_note: Done 2026-06-12 UTC: Executive Readout V2 can include governed ebita_impact_summary, markdown/html EBITA Impact Bridge sections, schema support, safe language, blocked claims, and next evidence actions. Usage-only ROI/EBITA, individual productivity, manager ranking, HRIS inference, and headcount claims remain blocked.

items.title: AI Value Platform: Executive Readout prototype UI
items.bound: frontend/src/pages/AIValueReadoutPrototype.tsx, frontend/src/pages/AIValueReadoutPrototype.test.tsx, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/styles.css, docs/concepts/AI_VALUE_READOUT_PROTOTYPE_UI.md; acceptance: static mock executive packet data, VBD posture, workflow outcome evidence, financial claim gate, EBITA bridge status, safe language, blocked claims, caveats, next evidence actions, no individual/manager/HRIS/named productivity or usage-derived ROI views
items.last_note: Done 2026-06-12 UTC: static aggregate/workflow-only executive readout prototype added at /ai-value-readout with VBD posture, outcome evidence, financial claim gate, EBITA bridge, safe/caveated language, blocked claims, and next evidence actions. No backend route, DB schema, ingestion, ML/scoring, dashboard, individual/manager/HRIS view, or usage-derived ROI was added.

items.title: AI Value Platform: canonical language alignment
items.bound: docs/architecture/CANONICAL_LANGUAGE_SYSTEM.md, docs/architecture/LANGUAGE_ALIGNMENT_MATRIX.md, docs/architecture/TERMINOLOGY_DEPRECATION_PLAN.md, shared/src/aiValueEngine/language.ts, executive packet/readout renderers, readout prototype labels; acceptance: executive, evidence, value, financial, governance, intervention, executive readout, and productivity recapture language are standardized through aliases/display labels only; existing schemas remain backward compatible; no governance control is weakened
items.last_note: Done 2026-06-12 UTC: canonical language docs, alignment matrix, deprecation plan, shared display labels, readout renderer labels, generated examples, and prototype labels are aligned around Value Hypothesis, Measurement Plan, Evidence Collection, Value Realization, Financial Translation, Value Accounting, Renewal Evidence, and Productivity Recapture. Existing schemas and governance controls remain unchanged.

items.title: AI Value Platform: data model persistence audit
items.bound: docs/architecture/AI_VALUE_DATA_MODEL_AUDIT.md; acceptance: current persistence inventory, framework concept classification, minimal Supabase state proposal, BigQuery vs Supabase split, privacy/governance constraints, recommended implementation order; no migrations, schema changes, backend routes, frontend UI, ingestion, or governance logic changes
items.last_note: Done 2026-06-13: audited AI Value Platform concepts and classified static framework, customer-specific durable state, derived evidence snapshots, and external sources of truth. Proposed the minimal future Supabase state path without creating migrations or product surface area.

items.title: Longitudinal state-space engine and NUTS concordance
items.bound: Synthetic-only inference/, required OpenSpec/docs, and confidence-engine bridge coverage; implement deterministic Gaussian state-space primary engine, PyMC NUTS reference engine, six-cell five-seed concordance, compiled diagnostics, and fail-closed HOLD behavior; no public surfaces or real data
items.last_note: Done 2026-07-12; human-authorized via 'build the queue item'. All 30 numerical slots passed. Runner identity/recomputation and lockfile/runtime bindings are hardened; a separate commit-and-evidence-bound CODE/BUG/ADVERSARIAL GO record unblocks only the next replicated synthetic-validation PR. Replicated validation and full proof remain incomplete.

items.title: Longitudinal replicated-validation runner
items.bound: Synthetic-only inference/, required OpenSpec/docs, and confidence-engine bridge coverage; implement a compiled 1,200-slot state-space calibration plan with deterministic chunk/resume/combine validation plus null, floor, lag, shock, model-selection, and negative-control runner paths; smoke/reduced and incomplete studies HOLD; no evidence-generation commit, public surfaces, real data, or authorization
items.last_note: Done 2026-07-12: exact 1,200-slot plan, resumable chunks/combine, calibration/null gates, floor/lag/negative controls, strict artifact/TypeScript bridge, and review hardening are implemented. Full inference 474 passed; four bridges 85 passed; CODE/BUG/ADVERSARIAL GO. No 1,200-row evidence was generated; parent validation and DiD remain incomplete.

items.title: Longitudinal replicated-validation full evidence run
items.bound: Synthetic-only evidence execution from merged runner PR #413: run four compiled canaries, all 20 chunks for exactly 1,200 calibration rows, fixed floor/lag/shock/negative controls, strict combine, sanitized artifact review, and one independent CODE/BUG/ADVERSARIAL acceptance round; no model or threshold changes unless actual execution fails, and no real data, public surfaces, customer output, or promotion
items.last_note: Done 2026-07-13: four canaries, all 20 chunks, exactly 1,200 calibration rows, four floors, 90 lag rows, and nine negative/shock controls passed. Strict combine was idempotent; the committed artifact and compact summary are hash-bound to separate CODE/BUG/ADVERSARIAL GO acceptance. Longitudinal state-space model proof and model-family Phase 3 are complete; DiD, measurement-model/VBD calibration, customer output, and production promotion remain incomplete.

items.title: AI Fluency measurement-model calibration prerequisites boundary
items.bound: Docs/spec-only boundary: distinguish aggregate snapshot context from the missing privacy-safe measurement evidence required by OpenSpec task 5.5; define fail-closed source, form/version, equating, invariance, HOLD, unsafe-input, and non-authorization requirements; no calibration completion, runtime model, schemas, routes, UI, persistence, connectors, real data, respondent rows, customer output, confidence/probability, ROI, causality, productivity, finance, HR, ranking, or economic output
items.last_note: Done 2026-07-13: documented PREREQUISITES_DEFINED_CALIBRATION_INCOMPLETE. Dimension summaries may provide approved aggregate context but cannot calibrate latent change. OpenSpec task 5.5 remains unchecked pending privacy-safe aggregate sufficient statistics, supported likelihood/form rules, equating/invariance proof, implementation, execution, and independent acceptance.
